markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games and parent Take-Two Interactive have now locked Grand Theft Auto VI for a November 19, 2026 release on PS5 and Xbox Series X/S following two official delays from the original 2025 window, a timeline reinforced in the publisher’s latest earnings call. This extended runway through the second half of 2026 has shifted trader focus toward events that could realistically unfold in the interim, including major album drops from artists like Rihanna and Playboi Carti, potential AI milestones such as GPT-6, and geopolitical developments like a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire. The market’s high trading volume reflects the gaming industry’s history of last-minute shifts, yet the current corporate guidance and revenue projections tied directly to that November date have stabilized expectations around the release window itself. Upcoming earnings updates and any final marketing pushes will serve as key signals for whether additional slippage remains possible before launch.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s third New York rape retrial on May 15, 2026, with a deadlocked jury on the Jessica Mann charge, has sharply elevated the implied probability of no additional prison time to 77%. The outcome leaves prosecutors weighing a potential fourth trial after a June 24 hearing, while Weinstein, now 74, continues serving a 16-year California sentence alongside prior mixed-verdict results. Traders appear to factor in his documented health issues, including heart complications, alongside defense appeals and the historical difficulty securing convictions in repeated proceedings. Upcoming decisions on retrial pursuit and any sentencing adjustments will likely drive near-term shifts in these market-implied odds.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2026 Stanley Cup race remains tightly contested between the Carolina Hurricanes and Vegas Golden Knights, whose implied probabilities sit within two points of each other as the playoffs reach their later stages. Both clubs advanced deep into their respective conference finals with strong regular-season point totals, consistent goaltending, and favorable matchups that preserved roster health heading into the final rounds. The Montreal Canadiens hold a distant third position after a solid Eastern Conference run but face steeper elimination risk against deeper competition. Recent series results have kept the top two outcomes bunched, reflecting ongoing uncertainty over which Eastern or Western representative will ultimately prevail in the championship round.

markets.question: Will the Montreal Canadiens win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Montreal Canadiens win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Oklahoma City Thunder's league-best 64-18 regular-season record and status as defending champions have anchored trader consensus around their 57.5% implied probability, even as their Western Conference Finals series against the San Antonio Spurs remains tightly contested at 2-2. The Spurs, finishing 62-20 behind Victor Wembanyama's All-NBA production, have narrowed the gap through strong postseason form but trail at 14.9% amid the matchup's physical demands. Meanwhile, the New York Knicks' sweep of the Eastern Conference finals has elevated their title odds to 28.7%, reflecting momentum from a nine-game winning streak and a deep roster featuring Jalen Brunson and Karl-Anthony Towns as they await the Western winner. These probabilities mirror recent playoff results and regular-season standings more than any single injury or roster change.

markets.question: Will MegaETH perform an airdrop by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if MegaETH launches a token and performs an airdrop by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market "locked" tokens or non-swappable tokens will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes". Airdrops of NFTs will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market is on-chain information and official information from MegaETH, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain and France sit atop the 2026 FIFA World Cup winner market as co-favorites due to their recent dominance in European competitions, deep attacking options, and balanced squads heading into the expanded 48-team field. England follows closely on the strength of its consistent qualifying campaign and experienced core, while Argentina benefits from defending-champion pedigree and Lionel Messi’s continued influence. Portugal, Brazil, and Germany round out the leading group through proven international depth and historical pedigree. The bunched pricing reflects a wide-open field where multiple sides share comparable recent form, tactical flexibility, and star power, with no single nation separating itself decisively in the final weeks before the June kickoff in North America.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping’s continued exercise of authority as General Secretary and Central Military Commission chairman, including his January 2026 address directing implementation of the 15th Five-Year Plan and multiple high-level diplomatic engagements, underpins trader consensus that he will remain in power through 2026. Ongoing personnel adjustments via anti-corruption measures have reinforced centralized control without evident elite fractures or a designated successor. The absence of confirmed health issues or procedural challenges ahead of the 21st Party Congress in late 2027 aligns with historical patterns of extended leadership tenure, limiting near-term transition risks within the market window.

markets.question: Will Gavin Newsom win the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

events.title: Democratic Presidential Nominee 2028
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

eventMetadata.context_description: The wide-open 2028 Democratic presidential field stems from the lack of an incumbent or consensus frontrunner after 2024, leaving traders to weigh name recognition, fundraising capacity, and ideological positioning across governors, senators, and national figures.
